electrician.label: ⚡ Electrician
questions: What type of electrical work do you need?
Is it a repair, installation, or replacement?
Are there any exposed wires or safety hazards?

plumber.label: 🔧 Plumber
questions: What plumbing issue are you experiencing?
Is there an active leak or flooding?
Is the issue in kitchen, bathroom, or pipeline?

carpenter.label: 🪵 Carpenter
questions: What kind of woodwork is needed?
Is it repair or new work?
Do you have the materials ready?

mason.label: 🧱 Mason
questions: What type of work — brickwork, plastering, or tiling?
Is it new construction, renovation, or repair?
Are materials available on site?

painter.label: 🎨 Painter
questions: How many rooms need painting?
Interior or exterior?
Do you have paint and materials, or should we arrange?

welder.label: 🔥 Welder
questions: What needs to be welded or fabricated?
What material — steel, iron, or aluminium?
Is it a repair or new fabrication?

ac_repair.label: ❄️ AC Repair & Service
questions: What is the issue with your AC?
Is it split AC, window AC, or cassette unit?
Has it been serviced in the last 6 months?

appliance_repair.label: 🔌 Appliance Repair
questions: Which appliance — fridge, washing machine, TV, or other?
What is the exact issue?
Is it still under warranty?

cleaning.label: 🧹 Home Cleaning
questions: Is this a deep clean or regular cleaning?
How many bedrooms and bathrooms?
Do you need cleaning supplies brought along?

pest_control.label: 🐜 Pest Control
questions: What type of pest — cockroaches, termites, rats, or bedbugs?
What is the approximate area in sq ft?
Are there children or elderly at home?

driver.label: 🚘 Personal Driver
questions: What type of vehicle needs driving?
Is it daily commute, outstation, or a one-time trip?
Round trip or one-way drop?

vehicle_repair.label: 🚗 Vehicle Repair (Doorstep)
questions: Is it a car, bike, or auto rickshaw?
What is the issue?
Is it a breakdown or routine service?

helper.label: 🤝 Helper / Labour
questions: What kind of help do you need?
How many helpers and for how long?
Is it lifting, shifting, or general assistance?

movers_packers.label: 📦 Movers & Packers
questions: What is the size of the move — 1BHK, 2BHK, or full house?
What is the pickup and drop location?
Do you need packing materials included?

cook.label: 👨‍🍳 Cook
questions: Is it for daily cooking or a one-time event?
How many people are to be served?
What cuisine — Kerala, North Indian, or other?

babysitter.label: 👶 Babysitter / Nanny
questions: How many children and what are their ages?
Is it for a few hours or a regular arrangement?
Are there any special care needs?

elder_care.label: 🧓 Elder Care Attendant
questions: What are the specific care needs?
Is the patient mobile or bedridden?
Day shift, night shift, or 24-hour care?

gardener.label: 🌿 Gardener
questions: What work is needed — mowing, trimming, or planting?
What is the approximate garden size?
One-time service or recurring?

security_guard.label: 🔒 Security Guard
questions: What premises — home, shop, or event?
Day shift, night shift, or 24 hours?
How many days do you need the guard?

waterproofing.label: 🏠 Waterproofing & Leakage
questions: Where is the leakage — roof, bathroom, or wall?
Approximate affected area in sq ft?
Has any prior waterproofing been done?

tank_cleaning.label: 💧 Tank & Sump Cleaning
questions: Is it a water tank, sump, or septic tank?
What is the approximate capacity?
When was it last cleaned?

solar_technician.label: ☀️ Solar Panel Service
questions: Is it installation, repair, or cleaning?
What is the system capacity in kW?
Is it a grid-tied or battery backup system?

cctv_installation.label: 📷 CCTV Installation
questions: How many cameras need to be installed?
New setup or repair of existing system?
Do you need remote viewing on your phone?

delivery.label: 🛵 Delivery Rider
questions: What needs to be delivered — parcels, documents, or goods?
What is the pickup and drop location?
Does the rider need to provide their own bike?
